items.summary: Validation-blocked exits now emit the blocked pushback artifact plus a zero-round run-postmortem, and cycle-postmortem PM-003 now counts validation and self-check issues separately.
The shared component-repair engine now boxes each authority under its relative source path so duplicate basenames cannot overwrite one another inside the repair bundle.
Referenced evidence paths are now normalized and must be boxable under shared/, tools/, or docs/; otherwise bundle construction throws instead of silently dropping the path.
The pre-board validation-block path now writes the pushback artifact that result.json advertises, so pushback_path is no longer a dangling machine-facing reference.

Ad-hoc round summaries now persist review_outcome, unresolved_items, and improvements_applied, and prior-round prompt context loads those stored values instead of fabricating them from severity counts.
